title: New Strategies for the Valorisation of Deodorizer Distillates of Vegetable Oils Refining in a Sustainable Circular Economy Development
description: A review of innovative methods for converting deodorizer distillates from vegetable oil refining into value-added bio-based products within a sustainable circular economy framework. It outlines novel processes for isolating valuable minor compounds using greener technologies and valorising free fatty acids into biodiesel, surfactants, and lubricants.
